title: Prove RepoGround cutover and rollback
goal: Use the active RepoGround migration as a declarative failover pilot with canary, bounded degradation, rollback and consumer verification.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: A parallel canary is identity-bound and cannot become primary before consumer verification.
The legacy runtime remains a tested bounded rollback until the replacement passes all gates.
Bureau and Schauwerk consumers read the intended RepoGround source without hidden Lenskit dependency.
Legacy retirement occurs only after rollback evidence, observation window and cleanup acceptance pass.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
